title: Singapore inks AI deals with Google, OpenAI as ChatGPT-maker commits $234 million to local ecosystem
summary_full: Singapore has signed new partnerships with Google and OpenAI to strengthen the city-state's position as a global AI hub and accelerating AI deployment.
summary_public: Singapore has signed new partnerships with Google and OpenAI to strengthen the city-state's position as a global AI hub and accelerating AI deployment.
